2026-06-22FINCanadian International Trade Tribunal ActRegulations Amending the Canadian International Trade Tribunal Procurement Inquiry Regulations Regulations Amending the Canadian International Trade Tribunal Procurement Inquiry Regulations in order to add the United Kingdom as a Comprehensive and Progressive Agreement for Trans-Pacific Partnership Member to Part 10 of the Schedule.Registration: SOR/2026-0157 Publication Date: 2026-07-01
subject: Regulations Amending the Canadian International Trade Tribunal Procurement Inquiry Regulations
precis: Regulations Amending the Canadian International Trade Tribunal Procurement Inquiry Regulations in order to add the United Kingdom as a Comprehensive and Progressive Agreement for Trans-Pacific Partnership Member to Part 10 of the Schedule.
